rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §101.003 defines 'child,' 'minor,' and 'adult' for family law purposes. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: "Child" or "minor" means a person under 18 years of age who is not and has not been married or who has not had the disabilities of minority removed for general purposes.
_note: No textual or substantive relationship between the proposed tax exemption increase and this family code definitional provision.
